Skip to contents
psrccensus 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    Calculate PUMS summaries Get Data

    Get equity tracts

    get_equity_geographies.Rd

    Retrieve a 0-1 variable for whether each tract in the region is in an equity geography or not

    Usage

    get_equity_geographies(
  equity_type = "50",
  equity_group = "race",
  year = "2019"
)

    Arguments

    equity_type

    string, The type of equity geography either '50' (50 percent) or 'regavg' (regional average)

    equity_group

    string, The group of people described by the equity geography, options are: 'race', 'poverty', 'disability', 'elderly', 'limited_english'

    year

    string, the year for which the equity geography is defined

    Value

    a data frame with all tracts in the region with a 0-1 variable for whether they are in an equity geography or not

    Author

    Suzanne Childress

    Examples

    if (FALSE) {
Sys.getenv("CENSUS_API_KEY")
}

get_equity_geographies(equity_type = 'regavg', equity_group = 'disability', year = '2019')
#> Reading layer `OGRGeoJSON' from data source 
#>   `https://services6.arcgis.com/GWxg6t7KXELn1thE/arcgis/rest/services/equity_tracts_2019/FeatureServer/0/query/?where=0=0&outFields=geoid,equity_disabled_vs_reg_average&f=pgeojson' 
#>   using driver `GeoJSON'
#> Simple feature collection with 891 features and 2 fields
#> Geometry type: POLYGON
#> Dimension:     XY
#> Bounding box:  xmin: -123.0234 ymin: 46.72799 xmax: -120.9062 ymax: 48.29924
#> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84
#>           geoid equity_disabled_vs_reg_average
#> 1   53033022006                              0
#> 2   53033032320                              0
#> 3   53033031703                              1
#> 4   53033031206                              0
#> 5   53033032102                              0
#> 6   53033032210                              0
